message:
chore: remove ephemeral artifacts and unused image variant from pi_agent_rust root

Seven files at the repo root were build artefacts, scan outputs, or
disused asset variants:

- optzst: 4 MB compiled ELF binary, output of an ad-hoc cargo build
  that landed at the workspace root rather than into target/release/.
- findings.jsonl: UBS Meta-Runner output from a 2026-03-04 scan
  ("Created filtered scan workspace at /tmp/...") — point-in-time
  scan log with no remaining diagnostic value.
- ubs_crit.jsonl: empty (0-byte) UBS critical-findings log left over
  from the same UBS run.
- test_hash.js: 1-line `console.log("Hello from test")` scratch from
  bring-up of the QuickJS-backed test harness.
- test_qjs.js: 16-line QuickJS reproducer that's been folded into the
  proper extension test fixtures under tests/extensions/ and the
  qjs_runtime crate's own test suite. The bare-root .js file is
  obsolete.
- storage.sqlite3: 100-page SQLite test database left over from local
  bring-up. Already covered by the .gitignore's sqlite-DB exclusions
  but only because it was committed before those rules existed.
- pi_agent_rust_illustration.png: superseded by
  pi_agent_rust_illustration.webp (kept) which is what README.md§2
  links to as the project hero image.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
